brief_notes: Covers the same BBB-plasticity study with a well-written introduction that thoroughly motivates the work. The tracer and blocker tables provide qualitative summaries (Extravasation/No extravasation, Blocked/Not affected) rather than quantitative permeability indices. ELISA and SEP data are described narratively but not tabulated with specific values. The proposed mechanistic pathway table is a good conceptual addition. The aCSF composition table is thorough but less important than missing quantitative results. RNA-seq results are described qualitatively. Human DCE-MRI results lack specific K-trans values.
